channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: YouTube TV price hike got you down? 5 free alternatives
item.description: Was YouTube TV’s recent price increase the straw that broke the camel’s back for you? When does the cost of streaming TV stop going up? When?!! The answer is: Never. These streaming services are going to keep creeping upward in cost until we’re all shelling out $300 a month. Enough is enough.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: AI use cases are going to get even bigger in 2025
item.description: Over the past two years, generative AI has dominated tech conversations and media headlines. Tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney, and Sora captured imaginations with their ability to create text, images, and videos, sparking both excitement and ethical debates.
item.dc:creator: Kolawole Samuel Adebayo, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok is full of bogus, potentially dangerous medical advice
item.description: TikTok is the new doctor’s office, quickly becoming a go-to platform for medical advice. Unfortunately, much of that advice is sketchy at best. A new report by the healthcare software firm Tebra found 45% of medical advice on TikTok to be false or misleading.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: Looking for small drones? Listen for the right radio signals
item.description: The recent spate of unidentified drone sightings in the U.S., including some near sensitive locations such as airports and military installations, has caused significant public concern. Some of this recent increase in activity may be related to a September 2023 change in U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Who’s who in Donald Trump’s new Silicon Valley entourage
item.description: There’s a larger coterie of tech world Trump supporters who are now working with the incoming administration, with varying degrees of formality.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: AI will eavesdrop on world's wildest places to track and help protect endangered wildlife
item.description: A biologist hid 350 audio monitors across Costa Rica’s tropical rainforests to spy on endangered spider monkeys in order to help protect them.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Say hello to SetMe: A modern solution for offering remote tech support
item.description: SetMe is a remote support solution for businesses of all sizes that allows IT teams to easily secure a connection to remote computers, allowing for ad-hoc or unattended support that was designed with years of experience in remote support software from the team behind FixMe.IT.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The 4 key aspects of a successful data strategy
item.description: How do data strategies work and do companies even need them? This question is on the minds of many business leaders today. At the same time, they are under increasing pressure to remain competitive and innovative.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The exciting new world of Redis
item.description: If you’re a developer who wants the most feature-rich, high-performance version of Redis, your choice is clear: Redis and not a fork. If you have the time and inclination to dabble in ideological debates about open source licensing, well, you might make another choice.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Overcoming modern observability challenges
item.description: Observability, at its core, is about collecting and analyzing data generated from applications, cloud computing resources, and edge devices to ensure software and services are run smoothly, user experiences are optimized, and resources are managed cost-effectively.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nissan and Honda to attempt a merger that would create the world's No. 3 automaker
item.description: Japanese automakers Nissan and Honda have announced plans to work toward a merger that would catapult them to a top position in an industry in the midst of tectonic shifts as it transitions away from its reliance on fossil fuels.
item.dc:creator: Mari Yamaguchi And Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why Big Tech is funding Trump's inauguration
item.description: Hefty donations from tech companies and leaders to President-elect Trump’s inaugural fund are a sign of Silicon Valley’s shifting relationship with the incoming leader after past tensions.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Trump pushes back on 'President Musk' claims
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday rejected the recent dubbing of tech billionaire Elon Musk as “President Musk” by Democrats. “No, he’s not gonna be president, that I can tell you,” Trump said at conservative group Turning Point's “America Fest” in Phoenix, Ariz.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Top 5 mistakes that could expose your financial data to cybercriminals
item.description: There are common habits and oversights that could leave your financial information vulnerable to cybercriminals, according to Kurt the CyberGuy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Albania to close TikTok for a year blaming it for promoting violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — Albania's prime minister said Saturday the government will shut down the video service TikTok for one year, blaming it for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mastering Azure management: A comparative analysis of leading cloud platforms
item.description: Azure’s growing adoption among companies leveraging cloud platforms highlights the increasing need for effective cloud resource management.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Threats delivered over encrypted channels continue to rise
item.description: Encryption is the default for online communication, with nearly all web traffic protected by secure protocols like TLS/SSL. Yet, as encryption becomes more ubiquitous by the day, so do the opportunities for threat actors to exploit encrypted channels.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia’s Run:ai acquisition waved through by EU
item.description: Nvidia will face no objections to its plan to acquire Israeli AI orchestration software vendor Run:ai Labs in Europe, after the European Commission gave the deal its approval Friday.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Never need an EV charging station again with these rooftop solar power panels
item.description: An inventor designed rooftop solar panels for a Tesla that draws solar energy while the car is parked, adding travel mileage without plugging in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cost-conscious repatriation strategies
item.description: In recent years, the cloud computing landscape has undergone a seismic shift. After fully embracing the potential of public cloud services, many companies are reevaluating their strategies and shifting workloads back to on-premises infrastructures.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 10 things you should never tell an AI chatbot
item.description: There are currently no laws governing what artificial intelligence can and cannot do with the information it gathers; here are 10 things to avoid telling AI chatbots to keep yourself safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New app reveals political affiliations to US homebuyers
item.description: The platform believes social factors like age, income, and education influence buyers' decisions over home layouts.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Anthropic’s LLMs can’t reason, but think they can
item.description: Anthropic on Wednesday published a study that explored how its large language model (LLM) deals with conflicting ethical requests. The results show that LLMs can still surprise, something that should scare IT execs preparing to trust generative AI (genAI) results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Slack adds Agentforce ‘hub’ for AI agents
item.description: Slack is adding a new way to access AI agents created on parent company Salesforce’s Agentforce platform, with a library of options available in the collaboration app. Agentforce, which launched in October, is a tool to build AI agents that answer questions and automate tasks for users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: OpenAI responds to Elon Musk's lawsuit
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Build a server-side web app with .NET, C#, and HTMX
item.description: There are many stacks on the server side and one of the most longstanding and capable ones is the .NET platform using C#. .NET is broadly comparable to the Java platform, and over the years, the two have been competitors and mutual influencers. Each draws inspiration from the other.
item.dc:creator: Info World
